zh.Marnäs, Ludvika, Ludvika, Dalarna, Swede: 瑞典達拉納盧德維卡盧德維卡芒亞斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guri Rasmusdatter於1505年出生在瑞典達拉納格朗亞德時，她的父親Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten25歲，母親Ingebor Iversdatter23歲。她和Nils Arfwidsson至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1565年在她的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.Marnäs, Ludvika, Ludvika, Dalarna, Swede: 瑞典達拉納盧德維卡盧德維卡芒亞斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guri Rasmusdatter于1505年出生在瑞典達拉納格朗亞德时，她的父亲Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten25岁，母亲Ingebor Iversdatter23岁。她和Nils Arfwidsson至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1565年在她的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Guri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: meaning ‘painted, coloured’ in Hebrew; it is borne in the Bible by a son of Naphtali and grandson of Jacob (Genesis 46:24).

historicEvents.title: The Stockholm Bloodbath
historicEvents.description: A mass execution of Swedish nobles by Danish king Christian II is known as the Stockholm Bloodbath. Christian II invaded Sweden in 1519 and took hold of Stockholm in September 1520. Over 80 nobles were executed for heresy on November 8 and 9. The outrage from the executions led to the Swedish removal of support of the Kalmar Union.

historicEvents.title: Swedish War of Liberation
historicEvents.description: The Swedish War of Liberation was a civil war led by nobleman Gustav Vasa. As Christian II heard of the rebellion, he confronted Vasa's men, who won the battle at Brunbacks Ferry. Christian II was defeated by the Swedes in Stockholm and a truce was agreed upon. Vasa was given as a hostage as a show of good faith until the treaty was signed. The Danish King did not keep his word and Vasa was held as a prisoner for two years until his escape. A bounty was placed on Vasa's head. Vasa worked to inspire many to join his cause and lived under disguise until the Danes surrendered in 1525.

historicEvents.title: Treaty of Malmo
historicEvents.description: The Treaty of Malmo was signed on September 1, 1524, which ended the Swedish War of Liberation and the independence of Sweden was recognized by Denmark and Norway.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the Bible
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the Bible, known as the Gustav Bible, was completed by Olaus Petri and Laurentius Andreae and published in 1540.

historicEvents.title: Sweden Becomes Lutheran Nation
historicEvents.description: Sweden officially declared itself a Lutheran nation in 1544.

en.lifeSummary: When Guri Rasmusdatter was born in 1505, in Grangärde, Dalarna, Sweden, her father, Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten, was 25 and her mother, Ingebor Iversdatter, was 23. She had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Nils Arfwidsson. She died in 1565, in her hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guri Rasmusdatter est née en 1505, à Grangärde, Dalarna, Suède, son père, Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ingebor Iversdatter, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Nils Arfwidsson. Elle est décédée en 1565, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guri Rasmusdatter 1505 in Grangärde, Dalarna, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten 25 und ihre Mutter Ingebor Iversdatter 23. Sie hatte mit Nils Arfwidsson mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1565 im Alter von 60 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guri Rasmusdatter è nata il nel 1505 nel Grangärde, Dalarna, Svezia, sua padre, Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Ingebor Iversdatter, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Nils Arfwidsson. Morì nel 1565, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guri Rasmusdatterが1505年にスウェーデンダラーナグラングaルドで生まれた時，父Rasmus Thollefsen Jottenは25歳，母Ingebor Iversdatterは23歳であった。彼女はNils Arfwidssonとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1565年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guri Rasmusdatter(이)가 1505년 스웨덴 다라른아 그랑a르드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ingebor Iversdatter(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Nils Arfwidsson(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1565년 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guri Rasmusdatter nasceu em 1505, em Grangärde, Dalarna, Suécia, seu pai, Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Ingebor Iversdatter, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Nils Arfwidsson. Ela faleceu em 1565, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guri Rasmusdatter родилась в 1505 г. в местности грангaрд, даларна, Швеция, её отцу по имени Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ingebor Iversdatter, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Nils Arfwidsson. Она умерла в 1565 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guri Rasmusdatter nació en 1505, en Grangärde, Dalarna, Suecia, su papá, Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Ingebor Iversdatter, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Nils Arfwidsson. Murió en 1565, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
